creator: inguaruz@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Warner Losh from comment #28)
My HP Compaq 6005 Pro SFF has an Athlon II X2 and, as far as I understand, was never shipped with a Pentium II. I was very surprised that this bug is in the i386 branch, because it is incorrect. I think we need to move it to amd64. Maybe this way the bug can be fixed
